APPEARANCES:
Adam Whittaker appearing as a representative for the plaintiff Emerald Fund.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Willie Bender is present.
Limited Scope Attorney John Weinstein appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. All parties and counsel are present and confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Settlement reached between parties and written settlement agreement filed with the clerk. Trial date is vacated.
